title: It's new
hint: Talk about a new experience or object.
sample: This phone is new and has many features.

title: Don't Cry
prompt: Write a comforting message telling someone not to cry.
sample: Don't cry, everything will be okay soon.

title: Memories Hurt
prompt: Explain why memories can sometimes hurt.
hint: Talk about feelings related to past experiences.
sample: Memories of lost love can make us feel sad and lonely.
